manual_vs_auto.manual_finding: Repeated setValue block should be grouped
manual_vs_auto.notes: P1 only and UI both show line 8 warning.
UI mapping stayed correct after rerun.

manual_vs_auto.manual_finding: dpSet block lacks try/catch style exception contract

manual_vs_auto.notes: Current UI now preserves EXC-DP-01 correctly.
UI shows Medium on line 16, matching API.
P2 is additive; P1 row stays visible with correct message.

manual_vs_auto.manual_finding: Critical float literal should be lifted to constant/config
Large panel-derived text contains repeated code and oversized function
manual_vs_auto.notes: CLI summary and Excel show 38 findings, but workspace UI only showed 17.

manual_vs_auto.manual_finding: Panel source should be treated as converted-view boundary, not mixed duplicate stream
manual_vs_auto.notes: Workspace mixed REVIEW-ONLY .pnl rows with underlying _pnl.txt rows and showed 50 items, while CLI summary for .pnl was 38.

defects.summary: POP_CTRL_AUTOBACKUP_HGB_C2_2_pnl.txt shows 17 findings in workspace UI but 38 findings in CLI summary and Excel detail sheet.
Selecting POP_CTRL_AUTOBACKUP_HGB_C2_2.pnl in workspace produced mixed REVIEW-ONLY synthetic .pnl rows plus underlying _pnl.txt findings, with UNKNOWN rule ids on synthetic rows.

Live AI compare/prepare is operational, but patch semantics are nondeterministic across runs. One UI smoke/manual run produced dpSet(...) for a setMultiValue recommendation, while later API prepare produced setMultiValue(...).
Original Benchmark live-AI apply succeeded and restored cleanly, but reanalysis increased P1 total from 4 to 5 and introduced HARD-02, so successful apply does not yet imply review quality.

feature_additions.item: Triage entry metadata: owner, expires_at, reason template, history log
feature_additions.rationale: Suppression is functional today, but audit evidence is thin without ownership and expiry.

feature_additions.item: Saved analysis presets for P1-only, P1+P2, Live AI, raw txt boundary review
feature_additions.rationale: Human test flows repeatedly toggle the same settings.

feature_additions.item: Excel queue retry and per-run download history panel
feature_additions.rationale: Queue state is visible, but it is still hard to trace which xlsx belongs to which rerun without reading output dirs.

feature_additions.item: Rules editor with sample preview and detector dry-run
feature_additions.rationale: Rule tuning would be safer if rule changes could be previewed against fixture snippets before enabling.

maintenance_recommendations.rationale: Current workspace flows still permit txt/pnl count drift and mixed synthetic/native rows.
renderer.js ~2034 lines, autofix-ai.js ~1484 lines, workspace-view.js ~1315 lines increase coupling and regression risk.
live_ai_review_mixin.py ~829 lines and analysis_pipeline.py ~548 lines indicate broad contracts that are hard to reason about.

maintenance_recommendations.item: Centralize encoding/BOM/cp949 boundary policy and viewer expectations
maintenance_recommendations.rationale: txt/pnl boundary behavior remains the most confusing user-visible area.

maintenance_recommendations.item: Automate audit artifact retention and cleanup
maintenance_recommendations.rationale: Large numbers of reports, smokes, and benchmark files accumulate quickly during tuning/audit loops.

top10: Fix workspace aggregation so raw txt findings count matches CLI/Excel totals.
Fix .pnl workspace boundary handling so only one canonical stream is shown at a time.
Preserve true rule_id/severity for converted .pnl rows instead of UNKNOWN synthetic labels.
Make Live AI patch generation deterministic for canonical WinCC OA transforms like setMultiValue.
Gate apply success on post-apply heuristic delta, not only syntax/semantic guard pass.
Add explicit UI badges for synthetic REVIEW-ONLY rows vs engine-native findings.
Expose triage history and expiry so suppressions can be audited after the fact.
Add preset-based analysis workflows to reduce repetitive manual toggling.
Split frontend workspace/autofix code into smaller modules with narrower state contracts.
Add an audit mode that emits one consolidated machine-readable report without manual stitching.

final_verdict.summary: Core P1 rule detection for BenchmarkP1Fixture.ctl and GoldenTime.ctl matches manual review. Remaining problems are concentrated in txt/pnl workspace presentation and Live AI/autofix quality rather than missing P1 detector implementation.
